race.comment: TWICE AZ COOL (8) fourth-up today and a win looks imminent. Comes out of a strong Super Maiden after covering ground in the run to finish seventh over 1300m at Scone. Blinkers go on and can overcome the sticky gate. ENCRYPTIX (1) kept fresh for this after he made his debut with a solid on-pace second over 1100m at Gosford on April 25. Since fitted with a 1000m trial win at Gosford. Winkers go on from the low gate and will prove hard to run down. MOANA GOLD (12) returns from a let-up. Did a few things wrong last start but still managed to finish fourth over 1350m at Wyong. Visors go on and due for a change of luck. ORANGE TSUNAMI (2) gelded over the break and comes here with a host of gear changes. Chipped away late with a tidy fourth to Pimlico over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Should be forward enough following two recent trials and stays in the mix. MOSSROCKET (13) two runs have only been fair on the provincial circuit and must be kept safe from the good gate.
